description_long: This is a modern, upright refrigerator with a matte dark exterior and a two-door design, featuring a larger upper compartment and a smaller lower freezer drawer. The front door is partially open, revealing a white interior with multiple shelves and several blue and white containers neatly arranged inside. The refrigerator has a sleek, rectangular form with clean lines and a flat top, making it suitable for placement against a wall or in a kitchen alcove. The door handle is vertically oriented and protrudes slightly, providing an easy grip for opening. The lower section appears to be a pull-out freezer drawer, indicated by the visible handle and the compartmentalized storage inside. No visible branding, control panels, or vent patterns are present on the exterior surfaces.
description: A sleek, dark-colored refrigerator with a two-door design, featuring a visible white interior and blue containers. The exterior is matte and modern, with a vertical handle and a pull-out freezer drawer.
description_view_0: Front view showing the open upper door, white interior shelves, and blue containers; the vertical handle and lower freezer drawer are visible.
description_view_1: Side view displaying the solid, matte dark exterior with no visible features except the door's edge and handle.
description_view_2: Rear view showing a plain, flat back with no visible vents, branding, or features; the bottom freezer drawer is slightly visible.
description_view_3: Opposite side view with the door edge and handle visible, showing the thickness of the doors and the overall depth.
attribute_door_handle_style: Protruding vertical handle on the right side of the upper door, easy to grip and visually distinct.
